remarks: Welcome Home to the Biltmore! Unbeatable, spacious 1 BR condo for rent in the heart of downtown Stamford. Located on the 14th floor w/ breathtaking city views & boasting 831 sq. ft. of living space, this layout is one of the larger units in the entire complex. Lovely, modern white kitchen w/ stainless steel appliances, built-in microwave, dishwasher, breakfast counter & tons of cabinet space, which flows nicely into the dining area & sun-filled living room. The oversized bedroom can easily fit a queen or king size bed & is complimented by a full bath & walk-in closet. This amazing unit also features central A/C, hardwood floors & custom window treatments throughout. As if that weren't enough, the building offers exceptional amenities including 24-hour concierge service, a state-of-the-art fitness center, community room, expansive outdoor courtyard, dog park & a convenient shuttle to the Metro-North train station. Pet-friendly & close proximity to plenty of restaurants, shopping, public transportation, highway access, beach, marina & so much more! Don't miss out on this amazing rental opportunity!!!
